    <!-- PLACE THIS SECTION INSIDE OF YOUR HEAD TAGS -->
    <script data-cfasync="false" src="/js/ads-helper.js" type="text/javascript" defer></script>
    <!-- Below is a recommended list of pre-connections, which allow the network to establish each connection quicker, speeding up response times and improving ad performance. -->

    <script data-cfasync="false" type="text/javascript">
        var freestar = freestar || {};
        freestar.hitTime = Date.now();
        freestar.queue = freestar.queue || [];
        freestar.config = freestar.config || {};
        freestar.debug = window.location.search.indexOf('fsdebug') === -1 ? false : true;

        freestar.config.enabled_slots = [];
        window.enabled_ad_slots = [];

        
                        ! function(a, b) {
                    var c = b.getElementsByTagName("script")[0],
                        d = b.createElement("script"),
                        e = "https://a.pub.network/270towin-com";
                    e += freestar.debug ? "/qa/pubfig.min.js" : "/pubfig.min.js", d.async = !0, d.src = e, c.parentNode.insertBefore(d, c)
                }(window, document);
            freestar.initCallback = function() {
                (freestar.config.enabled_slots.length === 0) ? freestar.initCallbackCalled = false: freestar.newAdSlots([]);
                load_ads();
            }

    <!-- Google Maps -->
    <!-- <script type="text/javascript"
        src="//maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/js?key=AIzaSyCLBR6IcMwM9lfARkQKxRX7M1fASM7bn-g&libraries=places&callback=initialize_location_autocomplete"

    <!-- Global site tag (gtag.js) - Google Analytics -->
    <script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-VLJHJ6H0Q3"></script>
    <script>
        window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];

        function gtag() {
            dataLayer.push(arguments);
        }
        gtag('js', new Date());

        gtag('config', 'G-VLJHJ6H0Q3');
    </script>

    
    <script>
        // location autocomplete
        function initialize_location_autocomplete() {
            var options = {
                fields: ["name", "geometry.location", "formatted_address"],
                // types: ["geocode"],
                types: ["route", "postal_code", "sublocality", "locality", "administrative_area_level_1"],
                componentRestrictions: {
                    country: "us"
                }
            };
            var input = document.getElementById('searchLocation');
            var autocomplete = new google.maps.places.Autocomplete(input, options);
            google.maps.event.addListener(autocomplete, 'place_changed', function() {
                var s = autocomplete.getPlace().formatted_address;
                window.location = "/elected-officials/address.php?s=" + format_location_string(s);
            });
            var input_mobile = document.getElementById('searchLocationMobile');
            var autocomplete_mobile = new google.maps.places.Autocomplete(input_mobile, options);
            google.maps.event.addListener(autocomplete_mobile, 'place_changed', function() {
                var s = autocomplete_mobile.getPlace().formatted_address;
                window.location = "/elected-officials/address.php?s=" + format_location_string(s);
            });
            var input_elected_officials = document.getElementById('searchTextField');
            if (input_elected_officials) {
                var autocomplete_elected_officials = new google.maps.places.Autocomplete(input_elected_officials, options);
                google.maps.event.addListener(autocomplete_elected_officials, 'place_changed', function() {
                    var s = autocomplete_elected_officials.getPlace().formatted_address;
                    window.location = "/elected-officials/address.php?s=" + format_location_string(s);
                });
            }

            var cong_options = {
                fields: ["name", "geometry.location", "formatted_address"],
                types: ["address"],
                componentRestrictions: {
                    country: "US"
                }
            };
            var input_cong_districts = document.getElementById('searchTextFieldNew');
            if (input_cong_districts) {
                var autocomplete_cong_districts = new google.maps.places.Autocomplete(input_cong_districts, cong_options);
                google.maps.event.addListener(autocomplete_cong_districts, 'place_changed', function() {
                    var s = format_location_string(autocomplete_cong_districts.getPlace().formatted_address);
                    window.location = "/my-new-congressional-district/index.php?s=" + btoa(format_location_string(s));
                });
            }

        }

        function format_location_string(s) {
            if (s.toLowerCase() == "oklahoma, usa") {
                s = "Oklahoma State";
            } else if (s.toLowerCase() == "new york, usa") {
                s = "New York State";
            } else if (s.toLowerCase() == "washington, usa") {
                s = "Washington State";
            }
            var s = s.replace(', USA', '');
            return s;
        }
    </script>

    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {

            /* Plugin to integrate in your js. By djibe, MIT license */
            function bootstrapClearButton() {
                $('.position-relative :input').on('keydown focus', function() {
                    if ($(this).val().length > 0) {
                        $(this).nextAll('.form-clear').removeClass('d-none');
                    }
                }).on('keydown keyup blur', function() {
                    if ($(this).val().length === 0) {
                        $(this).nextAll('.form-clear').addClass('d-none');
                    }
                });
                $('.form-clear').on('click', function() {
                    $(this).addClass('d-none').prevAll(':input').val('');
                });
            }

            // Init the script on the pages you need
            bootstrapClearButton();
            $('.navbar-toggler, .search-toggler').on("click", function() {
                if ($(this).hasClass('collapsed')) {
                    $('.menu-overlay').fadeIn('fast');
                } else {
                    $('.menu-overlay').fadeOut('fast');
                }
            });
            $('.alert-270.append-to-mainContent').detach()
                .prependTo('#main-content > .container > .row > div.col-md-12:first')
                .show();

            // Add slideDown animation to Bootstrap dropdown when expanding.
            $('.dropdown').on('show.bs.dropdown', function() {
                $(this).find('.dropdown-menu').first().stop(true, true).slideDown('fast');
            });
            // Add slideUp animation to Bootstrap dropdown when collapsing.
            $('.dropdown').on('hide.bs.dropdown', function() {
                $(this).find('.dropdown-menu').first().stop(true, true).slideUp('fast');
            });
            var mainNav = $('#main-navigation');
            mainNav.on('show.bs.collapse', '.collapse', function() {
                mainNav.find('.collapse.show').collapse('hide');
            });

            // Inline footnotes
            $('.footnote-handle').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                $($(this).attr('href')).collapse('toggle');
                if (!$(this).hasClass('activated')) {
                    $(this).addClass('activated');
                    $(this).attr('footnote-id', $(this).find('sup').text());
                    $(this).find('sup').text('x');
                } else {
                    $(this).removeClass('activated');
                    $(this).find('sup').text($(this).attr('footnote-id'));
                }
            });

            // Load freestar ads on resize
                            var viewport_width = $(window).width();
                var viewport_resizeTimer;
                $(window).on('resize', function(e) {
                    if ($(window).width() != viewport_width) {
                        clearTimeout(viewport_resizeTimer);
                        freestar.deleteAdSlots(window.enabled_ad_slots);
                        viewport_width = $(window).width();
                        viewport_resizeTimer = setTimeout(function() {
                            load_ads();
                        }, 300);
                    }
                });
            
            if ($(window).width() < 768) {
                $('#site-header-wrapper').css('position', 'fixed');
                $('#header-ad').addClass('fixed-ad');
                $('#main-content .container').css('position', 'relative').css('top', '225px').css('margin-bottom', '225px');

                setTimeout(function() {
                    $('#site-header-wrapper').css('position', 'relative');
                    $('#header-ad').removeClass('fixed-ad');
                    $('#main-content .container').css('position', 'unset').css('top', 'unset').css('margin-bottom', '0');
                }, 10000);
            }

        });
    </script>

    
    <script type="text/javascript">
        function receiveMessage(event) {
            if (["https://e.ddhq.io", "https://embeds.ddhq.io"].includes(event.origin) && event.data.id && event.data.height)
                document.getElementById(event.data.id).style.height = event.data.height + "px";
        }

        window.addEventListener("message", receiveMessage, false);
    </script>
    <style>
        .form-group.position-relative input {
            padding-right: 32px;
        }

        .form-clear {
            align-items: center;
            background: #cecece;
            border-radius: 50%;
            bottom: 8px;
            color: rgba(0, 0, 0, .54);
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            height: 24px;
            justify-content: center;
            position: absolute;
            top: 5px;
            right: 75px;
            width: 24px;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .form-text+.form-clear {
            bottom: calc(1rem + 18px);
        }

        .form-clear .material-icons {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        .banner-ad-stabilizer {
            height: 108px;
            overflow-y: hidden;
        }
    </style>
</head>




<body>

        </script>
    </div>

                                        <a class="dropdown-item" href="/2024-simulation/">
                                            <span class="dropdown-link">2024 Election Simulator</span></a>
                                        <!-- <a class="dropdown-item" href="/2024-presidential-election-calendar/">
                                            <span class="dropdown-link">2024 Presidential Calendar</span></a> -->

    <div id="main-content">
        <div class="overlay menu-overlay"></div>

        <div id="header-ad" class="row no-gutters border-bottom mb-4 pb-3 banner-ad-stabilizer">

            <div class="ad-wrapper header-ad-wrapper">

                <!-- Tag ID: 270towin_970x90_ATF -->
                <div align="center" id="270towin_970x90_ATF">
                    <script data-cfasync="false" type="text/javascript">
                        window.enabled_ad_slots.push("270towin_970x90_ATF");
                    </script>
                </div>

            </div>

        </div>

        <div class="container">

            
<div class="row">

    <div id="primary" class="col-md-12 col-lg-10 col-xl-9">

        <h1>
            2026 Polls: Florida House District 27        </h1>
        <div id="sharethis-inline-social-media"><div class="sharethis-inline-share-buttons mb-2"></div></div>

        
        <p id="poll_compare_help" style="display:none;"><input type="radio" disabled />&nbsp;Instantly compare a poll to
            prior one by same pollster</p>

        
            <div id="GE" class="polls-subtype-wrapper mb-3">
                                <h2 class="border-bottom mb-4">General Election &ndash; November 3</h2>

                
                
                                        <h4>
                        Peguero vs. Salazar                    </h4>
                    
                    <style>
    #polls {
        border-collapse: separate;
        border-spacing: 0;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #000;
    }

    #polls thead {
        color: #fff;
        text-align: center;
    }

    #polls th,
    #polls td {
        border: none;
        border-top: 1px solid #000;
        border-right: 1px solid #000;
        padding: 5px;
        background: #fff;
    }

    #polls th.poll_src,
    #polls td.poll_toggle {
        border-left: 1px solid #000;
    }

    #polls td.poll_avg,
    #polls td.poll_change {
        border-left: 1px solid #000;
    }

    #polls th.poll_toggle,
    #polls td.poll_src {
        border-left: none;
    }

    #polls td.poll_toggle {
        border-right: none;
    }

    #polls td.poll_date,
    #polls td.poll_sample {
        text-align: right;
    }

    #polls #poll_avg_row td {
        text-align: center;
        background-color: #DDD;
        color: black;
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    #polls #poll_avg_row td.disabled {
        color: #BBB;
    }

    #polls .withdrawn {
        color: #999 !important;
    }

    #polls tr.in_average_calculation td.poll_toggle,
    #polls tr.in_average_calculation td.poll_src,
    #polls tr.in_average_calculation td.poll_date {
        background-color: #DDD;
    }

    #polls td.poll_data {
        text-align: center;
        width: 160px;
    }

    @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) {

        #polls td.poll_avg,
        #polls td.poll_change {
            position: sticky;
            left: 0;
        }

        #polls td.poll_toggle {
            position: sticky;
            left: 0;
            min-width: 24px;
        }

        #polls th.poll_src {
            position: sticky;
            left: 0;
            z-index: 3;
        }

        #polls td.poll_src {
            position: sticky;
            left: 24px;
            min-width: 200px;
            z-index: 3;
        }

        #polls th.poll_date {
            position: sticky;
            left: 224px;
            z-index: 2;
            min-width: 95px;
        }

        #polls td.poll_date {
            position: sticky;
            left: 224px;
            min-width: 95px;
            z-index: 2;
        }

        #polls th.poll_sample {
            position: sticky;
            left: 319px;
            min-width: 125px;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        #polls td.poll_sample {
            text-align: right;
            position: sticky;
            left: 319px;
            min-width: 125px;
            z-index: 1;
        }

    }

    @media only screen and (min-width: 1400px) {

        .wide-candidates .polls-wrapper[num_candidates='2'] th.can_name {
            min-width: 240px;
        }

    }
</style>


<script>
    $(document).ready(function() {

        $('#polls_1893 #polls input[type="radio"]').prop('checked', false);

        $("#polls_1893 .show_polls").click(function() {
            event.preventDefault();
            $("#polls_1893 .show_polls").removeClass("page_active");
            $(this).addClass("page_active");
            var num_polls = $(this).attr('href');
            $("#polls_1893 #polls tr").each(function(i, l) {
                if (num_polls == 10) {
                    if (i > 11) {
                        $(this).hide();
                    }
                } else {
                    $(this).show();
                }
            });
        });

        $('#polls_1893 input[type="radio"][name="poll_rd"]').change(function() {
            var poll_source = $(this).closest('tr').find('.poll_src').text().trim();
            var poll_shown = 0;

            $('#polls_1893 #polls tr.poll_row').each(function(i, row) {
                let curr_poll_source = $(row).find('td.poll_src').text().trim();
                if (curr_poll_source == poll_source) {
                    if (poll_shown > 1) {
                        $(this).hide();
                    } else {
                        $(this).show();
                        poll_shown++;
                    }
                } else {
                    $(this).hide();
                    $("#polls_1893 #poll_avg_row").show();
                    $("#polls_1893 #poll_avg_row td").addClass("disabled");
                }

            });

            var poll_diff_text = "";

            $('#polls_1893 #polls th.can_name').each(function(i, candidate) {
                let candidate_id = $(candidate).attr('candidate_id');
                let poll_diff = 0;
                let candidate_polls = $("#polls_1893 td.poll_data[candidate_id='" + candidate_id + "']:visible").length;

                if (candidate_polls <= 1) {
                    poll_diff_text = poll_diff_text + "<td class='text-center'>N/A</td>";
                }

                $("#polls_1893 td.poll_data[candidate_id='" + candidate_id + "']:visible").each(function(i) {
                    if (i < 2) {
                        var backcolor = "black";
                        var myString = $(this).text().trim();
                        var newString = myString.substr(0, myString.length - 1);

                        if (i == 0) {
                            poll_diff = Number(newString);
                        } else {
                            poll_diff = poll_diff - Number(newString);
                            if (poll_diff > 0) {
                                var backcolor = "green";
                            } else if (poll_diff < 0) {
                                var backcolor = "red";
                            }
                            poll_diff_text = poll_diff_text + "<td class='text-center' style='font-weight:bold;color:" + backcolor + "'>" + poll_diff + "%</td>";
                        }
                    }
                })

            });

            $("#polls_1893 #close_compare").show();
            $("#polls_1893 #pages").hide();
            $("#polls_1893 #polls tr:last").after('<tr><td class="poll_change text-center" style="background-color:#DDD;font-weight:bold" colspan="4">Change</td>' + poll_diff_text + '<td></td></tr>');
        });

        $("#polls_1893 #close_compare").click(function() {
            location.reload();
        });

    });
</script>


        <div id="polls_1893" class="polls-wrapper mb-4" num_candidates="2">

        <div class="table-responsive">
            <table id="polls" class="table table-sm mb-1">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th class="poll_src" style="background-color:#999" colspan="2">Source</th>
                        <th class="poll_date" style="background-color:#999">Date</th>
                        <th class="poll_sample" style="background-color:#999">Sample</th>

                                                    <th candidate_id="18309" class="can_name " style="background-color:#3e5a96">
                                Peguero                            </th>
                                                    <th candidate_id="18308" class="can_name " style="background-color:#c23237">
                                Salazar*                            </th>
                        
                        <th class="poll_other" style="background-color:#999">Other</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>

                
                                    <tr poll_id="10729" class="poll_row " >
                        <td class="poll_toggle">
                                                    </td>
                        <td class="poll_src">
                                                            <a href="https://floridapolitics.com/archives/784817-__trashed-35/" target="_blank">Blueprint Polling</a>
                                                    </td>
                        <td class="poll_date text-center">3/12/2026</td>
                        <td class="poll_sample text-center">
                            451 LV &plusmn4.6%                        </td>

                        
                                <td candidate_id="18309" class="poll_data  
                                    " >
                                    40%                                                                    </td>

                            
                                <td candidate_id="18308" class="poll_data winner 
                                    " style="color:#fff; background-color:#d22532">
                                    47%                                                                    </td>

                            
                        <td style="text-align:center">13%</td>
                    </tr>
                
            </table>

                    </div>

        <button id="close_compare" class="btn btn-info mb-2" style="display:none">Close Compare</button>

        
        <p class="footnote">
            * Incumbent<br />
    </p>
    </div>


                    
                                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <div align="center" id="270towin_election_1">
                                <script data-cfasync="false" type="text/javascript">
                                    window.enabled_ad_slots.push('270towin_election_1');
                                </script>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    
                                        <h4>
                        Rodriguez vs. Salazar                    </h4>
                    
                    <style>
    #polls {
        border-collapse: separate;
        border-spacing: 0;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #000;
    }

    #polls thead {
        color: #fff;
        text-align: center;
    }

    #polls th,
    #polls td {
        border: none;
        border-top: 1px solid #000;
        border-right: 1px solid #000;
        padding: 5px;
        background: #fff;
    }

    #polls th.poll_src,
    #polls td.poll_toggle {
        border-left: 1px solid #000;
    }

    #polls td.poll_avg,
    #polls td.poll_change {
        border-left: 1px solid #000;
    }

    #polls th.poll_toggle,
    #polls td.poll_src {
        border-left: none;
    }

    #polls td.poll_toggle {
        border-right: none;
    }

    #polls td.poll_date,
    #polls td.poll_sample {
        text-align: right;
    }

    #polls #poll_avg_row td {
        text-align: center;
        background-color: #DDD;
        color: black;
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    #polls #poll_avg_row td.disabled {
        color: #BBB;
    }

    #polls .withdrawn {
        color: #999 !important;
    }

    #polls tr.in_average_calculation td.poll_toggle,
    #polls tr.in_average_calculation td.poll_src,
    #polls tr.in_average_calculation td.poll_date {
        background-color: #DDD;
    }

    #polls td.poll_data {
        text-align: center;
        width: 160px;
    }

    @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) {

        #polls td.poll_avg,
        #polls td.poll_change {
            position: sticky;
            left: 0;
        }

        #polls td.poll_toggle {
            position: sticky;
            left: 0;
            min-width: 24px;
        }

        #polls th.poll_src {
            position: sticky;
            left: 0;
            z-index: 3;
        }

        #polls td.poll_src {
            position: sticky;
            left: 24px;
            min-width: 200px;
            z-index: 3;
        }

        #polls th.poll_date {
            position: sticky;
            left: 224px;
            z-index: 2;
            min-width: 95px;
        }

        #polls td.poll_date {
            position: sticky;
            left: 224px;
            min-width: 95px;
            z-index: 2;
        }

        #polls th.poll_sample {
            position: sticky;
            left: 319px;
            min-width: 125px;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        #polls td.poll_sample {
            text-align: right;
            position: sticky;
            left: 319px;
            min-width: 125px;
            z-index: 1;
        }

    }

    @media only screen and (min-width: 1400px) {

        .wide-candidates .polls-wrapper[num_candidates='2'] th.can_name {
            min-width: 240px;
        }

    }
</style>


<script>
    $(document).ready(function() {

        $('#polls_1530 #polls input[type="radio"]').prop('checked', false);

        $("#polls_1530 .show_polls").click(function() {
            event.preventDefault();
            $("#polls_1530 .show_polls").removeClass("page_active");
            $(this).addClass("page_active");
            var num_polls = $(this).attr('href');
            $("#polls_1530 #polls tr").each(function(i, l) {
                if (num_polls == 10) {
                    if (i > 11) {
                        $(this).hide();
                    }
                } else {
                    $(this).show();
                }
            });
        });

        $('#polls_1530 input[type="radio"][name="poll_rd"]').change(function() {
            var poll_source = $(this).closest('tr').find('.poll_src').text().trim();
            var poll_shown = 0;

            $('#polls_1530 #polls tr.poll_row').each(function(i, row) {
                let curr_poll_source = $(row).find('td.poll_src').text().trim();
                if (curr_poll_source == poll_source) {
                    if (poll_shown > 1) {
                        $(this).hide();
                    } else {
                        $(this).show();
                        poll_shown++;
                    }
                } else {
                    $(this).hide();
                    $("#polls_1530 #poll_avg_row").show();
                    $("#polls_1530 #poll_avg_row td").addClass("disabled");
                }

            });

            var poll_diff_text = "";

            $('#polls_1530 #polls th.can_name').each(function(i, candidate) {
                let candidate_id = $(candidate).attr('candidate_id');
                let poll_diff = 0;
                let candidate_polls = $("#polls_1530 td.poll_data[candidate_id='" + candidate_id + "']:visible").length;

                if (candidate_polls <= 1) {
                    poll_diff_text = poll_diff_text + "<td class='text-center'>N/A</td>";
                }

                $("#polls_1530 td.poll_data[candidate_id='" + candidate_id + "']:visible").each(function(i) {
                    if (i < 2) {
                        var backcolor = "black";
                        var myString = $(this).text().trim();
                        var newString = myString.substr(0, myString.length - 1);

                        if (i == 0) {
                            poll_diff = Number(newString);
                        } else {
                            poll_diff = poll_diff - Number(newString);
                            if (poll_diff > 0) {
                                var backcolor = "green";
                            } else if (poll_diff < 0) {
                                var backcolor = "red";
                            }
                            poll_diff_text = poll_diff_text + "<td class='text-center' style='font-weight:bold;color:" + backcolor + "'>" + poll_diff + "%</td>";
                        }
                    }
                })

            });

            $("#polls_1530 #close_compare").show();
            $("#polls_1530 #pages").hide();
            $("#polls_1530 #polls tr:last").after('<tr><td class="poll_change text-center" style="background-color:#DDD;font-weight:bold" colspan="4">Change</td>' + poll_diff_text + '<td></td></tr>');
        });

        $("#polls_1530 #close_compare").click(function() {
            location.reload();
        });

    });
</script>


        <div id="polls_1530" class="polls-wrapper mb-4" num_candidates="2">

        <div class="table-responsive">
            <table id="polls" class="table table-sm mb-1">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th class="poll_src" style="background-color:#999" colspan="2">Source</th>
                        <th class="poll_date" style="background-color:#999">Date</th>
                        <th class="poll_sample" style="background-color:#999">Sample</th>

                                                    <th candidate_id="18310" class="can_name " style="background-color:#3e5a96">
                                Rodriguez                            </th>
                                                    <th candidate_id="18308" class="can_name " style="background-color:#c23237">
                                Salazar*                            </th>
                        
                        <th class="poll_other" style="background-color:#999">Other</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>

                
                                    <tr poll_id="10729" class="poll_row " >
                        <td class="poll_toggle">
                                                    </td>
                        <td class="poll_src">
                                                            <a href="https://floridapolitics.com/archives/784817-__trashed-35/" target="_blank">Blueprint Polling</a>
                                                    </td>
                        <td class="poll_date text-center">3/12/2026</td>
                        <td class="poll_sample text-center">
                            451 LV &plusmn4.6%                        </td>

                        
                                <td candidate_id="18310" class="poll_data  
                                    " >
                                    43%                                                                    </td>

                            
                                <td candidate_id="18308" class="poll_data winner 
                                    " style="color:#fff; background-color:#d22532">
                                    46%                                                                    </td>

                            
                        <td style="text-align:center">11%</td>
                    </tr>
                
            </table>

                    </div>

        <button id="close_compare" class="btn btn-info mb-2" style="display:none">Close Compare</button>

        
        <p class="footnote">
            * Incumbent<br />
    </p>
    </div>


                    
                
            </div>

        
        <p class="footnote">
    </p>
